chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1348 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For non-prosecution of CMA No.6364/2025 (C/A) 14-10-2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press the listed Contempt Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
